zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty於1476年出生在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪時，他的父親Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty32歲，母親Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater19歲。他於1495年與Helen Abernethy在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年在他的家鄉享年81歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty于1476年出生在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪时，他的父亲Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty32岁，母亲Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater19岁。他于1495年与Helen Abernethy在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1557年在他的家乡享年81岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪。

nameMeanings.name: Urquhart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Ross and Cromarty): habitational name from any of various places in Scotland so called, notably the barony of Urquhart (Inverness), or places in Ross and Cromarty, Morayshire, and Fife. All are thought to derive from Pictish ar ‘on, by’ + Pictish carden ‘enclosure’ or ‘wood, copse’. Some bearers of this name trace their descent from William de Urchard, who fought for Robert the Bruce between 1297 and 1328.

variants.name: Orcutt
meanings: English (Staffordshire): perhaps a much altered form of Scottish   Urquhart  .

variants.name: Orchard
meanings: topographic or occupational name from residence near (or perhaps employment at) an orchard, Middle English orchard (Old English ortgeard, orceard).

habitational name from any of the places called Orchard. Those in Devon and Somerset are named from Old English ortgeard, orceard (a compound of wort, wyrt ‘plant’ (later associated with Latin hortus ‘garden’) + geard ‘yard, enclosure’), while East and West Orchard near Shaftesbury in Dorset derive from Primitive Welsh ar ‘beside, in front of, facing’ + ced ‘wood’.
rare variant of Scottish   Urquhart  . Compare   Orahood  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty was born in 1476, in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty, was 32 and his mother, Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, was 19. He married Helen Abernethy in 1495, in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1557, in his hometown, at the age of 81, and was buried in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty est né en 1476, à Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Helen Abernethy en 1495, à Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1557, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1495 in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom Helen Abernethy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1557 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty è nato il nel 1476 nel Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Helen Abernethy nel 1495, nel Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1557, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromartyが1476年にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイクロマルトイで生まれた時，父Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromartyは32歳，母Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlaterは19歳であった。1495年にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイクロマルトイでHelen Abernethyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年に故郷で81歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイクロマルトイにて埋葬された。

ko.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty(이)가 1476년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1495년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티에서 Helen Abernethy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty nasceu em 1476, em Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Abernethy em 1495, em Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1557, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty родился в 1476 г. в местности кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Abernethy в 1495 г. в местности кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1557 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Helen Abernethy en 1495, en Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1557, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido.
